pr_title: Architecture: Extract business logic to service layer

agent_summaries.architecture: Architecture analysis: Found 3 issues (1 high, 1 medium, 1 low)

priority_issues.description: The User class violates the Single Responsibility Principle by handling multiple responsibilities such as password validation, email sending, logging, and reputation calculation.
priority_issues.recommendation: Refactor the User class to delegate these responsibilities to a UserService or other appropriate classes following the Single Responsibility Principle.

priority_issues.description: Sensitive operations like sending emails and logging should not be directly handled in the service layer. This violates the single responsibility principle and could lead to maintainability issues.
priority_issues.recommendation: Move the email sending and logging operations to separate modules or classes dedicated to handling these concerns.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: Calculating user reputation score with linear complexity
priority_issues.recommendation: Optimize reputation calculation to achieve constant time complexity
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: Calculating user reputation score with linear complexity
priority_issues.recommendation: Optimize reputation calculation to achieve constant time complexity
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue
Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The User class contains a long method exceeding 50 lines.
priority_issues.recommendation: Extract the long method into smaller, more focused methods to improve readability and maintainability.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The UserService class lacks a clear and descriptive name.
priority_issues.recommendation: Consider renaming UserService to a more descriptive name that reflects its purpose in the application.
